package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_returns_map_string_any_output: Services that return dynamic maps instead of typed result contracts.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule177NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule177NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule177NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario177Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule177NegativeService, input Rule177NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
